blended.narrative: Granite Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,003 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
